kernel: fused_qknorm_rope: 2-heads-per-warp float4 production path (hd128/rope128/neox=False/bf16) + generic 1-head/warp templated variant; fp32 RMSNorm warp reduction; interleaved (GPT-J) RoPE with coalesced cos/sin loads; occupancy-based grid-stride
source_lineage: ported from kda_kernels/diffusion/qknorm_rope/_impls/b200/csrc/qknorm_rope_kernel.cu (sibling B200 promotion, geomean 1.1113x); SM-agnostic, rebuilt for sm_90 unchanged
correctness: PASS 27/27: 9 captured shapes via dispatch=cuda; regression-grid (hd64/hd256/rope64/neox->fallback, int32->cuda); positions zero/repeat/shuffled (int32+int64); wrapper-level negatives CPU/device-mismatch(q/k split both directions)/int16/non-contig/misaligned/fp16/aliased all fallback+no-raise; double-install recursion raises; gate test; ATOL=8e-2 RTOL=1e-2; max_abs_err<=0.0625; no NaN/Inf

benchmark.per_shape_speedup_range: large ~1.14-1.16x (stable), tiny ~1.0-1.1x (launch-bound, noisy -> dominate the all-9 geomean variance)
benchmark.note: end-to-end via the wrapper safety gate; kernel unchanged; the all-9 geomean is noisy due to launch-bound tiny shapes

dispatcher: 2-heads-per-warp universal; 1-head 1.20-1.22x slower on large, ties tiny
conclusion: near attainable bound on large (memory-latency on irreducible q/k traffic); tiny launch-bound no-go; geomean ~1.11x end-to-end (large stable ~1.14-1.16x); ranked future direction: shared-memory cos/sin staging (bounded upside)

verification: post-export smoke on H200: dispatcher CUDA path (cap 9,0)=cuda; h200 WRAPPER-level fallback for CPU + true q/k device-mismatch all oracle-correct (the installed dispatcher routes all-CPU to the SGLang baseline by design - CPU is not a promoted-arch path); --revert removes h200 keeps b200; re-export restores
round1_changes: wrapper-level fallback safety (PyTorch semantic reference for CPU/device-mismatch/misaligned/aliased/fp16/int16; never raises) + benchmark/process provenance (exact command + nvidia-smi before/after)
round2_changes: per-output-tensor-device reference (true q/k device mismatch); double-install recursion detection + RuntimeError (_is_recursive_baseline); per-run nvidia-smi idleness in gpu_state.md; exact run_bench command in interface.md; fallback docs distinguish SGLang baseline vs PyTorch reference; overlay KDA_COMMIT updated to the fix commit; run_bench.sh exit $RC
